prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约14676名，2024年约5926名，2025年约4989名，近两年位次大幅前移（2024年较2023年前移约8750名，2025年较2024年前移约937名），显示该 校在新疆理科考生中热度持续上升；该校理科在新疆招生计划2023年25人、2024年25人、2025年27人，2026年计划 25人，较2025年缩招2人（-7.4%），缩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第57名，近年排名持续上升，学校综合实力稳 步提升，对考生吸引力增强；2025年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件；抖音热度总排名第73位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低， 对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估中法学获评A、应用经济学获评A-，法学为该校王牌学科；理科招生专业中法学类、财政学类、金融学类均与优势学科直 接相关，对高分理科生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年热度评估为推荐，电子信息/通信为高热推荐，相关工科专业热度较高；新疆2026年高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年大幅增长，竞争显著加剧，2025年理科本科一批421分；中南 财经政法大学位于湖北武汉，属跨省招生；该校在新疆招生占比极小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合近两年位次大幅前移趋势（热度上升）、2026年计划小幅 缩招（-7.4%）、新疆考生总数大幅增长等因素，在2025年基准4989名基础上预计竞争略加剧但位次仍保持前移惯性；预测最低位次约4737名，区间4237–5237名。

- 会计学（会计学、会计学注册会计师、财管）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学）
- 法学类（法学、民商法方向、涉外法治方向等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4237–5237名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<4237名）可重点冲刺会计学、法学类等王牌专业；位次 接近区间上限（>5237名）应以三档专业为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 14676, in 2024 approximately 5926, and in 2025 approximately 4989. In the past two years, the ranking has significantly moved forward (2024 moved forward by about 8750 places compared to 2023, and 2025 moved forward by about 937 places compared to 2024), indicating a continuous rise in popularity among science candidates in Xinjiang. The enrollment plan for science in Xinjiang was 25 in 2023, 25 in 2024, 27 in 2025, and 25 in 2026, a reduction of 2 students (-7.4%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous rise in recent years, steadily improving overall strength and increasing attractiveness to candidates. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents. The overall Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as average, with moderate to low exposure on short video platforms, having limited impact on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A, and applied economics was rated A-, with law being the university's flagship discipline. Among the science enrollment majors, law, finance and taxation, and finance are directly related to advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation for computer science was recommended, and electronic information/communication was highly recommended, with related engineering majors being quite popular. The total number of candidates in Xinjiang for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, sharply intensifying competition. The 2025 science undergraduate first batch score line is 421 points. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and is a cross-provincial enrollment institution. The enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is extremely small, so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant forward trend in rankings over the past two years (rising popularity), the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-7.4%), and the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 4989, but the ranking will still maintain a forward momentum. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4737, with a range of 4237–5237.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Accounting (Accounting, Accounting CPA, Financial Management)
- Finance and Taxation (Finance, Taxation)
- Law (Law, Civil and Commercial Law, Foreign-related Rule of Law, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Finance (Finance, Investment)
- International Business
- Computer Science (Data Science and Big Data Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Artificial Intelligence)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Business Analytics, AI Application and Management, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Tourism Management, Supply Chain Management)
- International Politics
- Sociology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4237–5237, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4237), you can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as Accounting and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5237), you should choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 696, in 2024 approximately 707, and in 2025 approximately 866. Over the past three years, the ranking has continuously shifted backward, with a shift of about 170 places from 2023 to 2025, indicating an intensifying competition trend. The enrollment plan for liberal arts at this university in Xinjiang was 26 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 25 in 2025, and 28 in 2026, an increase of 3 students (+12%) compared to 2025. The expansion slightly alleviates competition, but rankings are still affected by other factors.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a continuous upward trend in recent years (65 in 2021 → 66 in 2022 → 67 in 2023 → 71 in 2024 → 62 in 2025 → 57 in 2026). The university's comprehensive strength has steadily improved. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (professor assessment controversy), which had a certain negative impact on application psychology. The overall ranking on Douyin (TikTok) was 73rd, with a general evaluation, indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A, and applied economics was rated A-. Law is the university's flagship discipline, with significant competitiveness among finance, economics, and law universities, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of the law major was assessed as divergent and wait-and-see, and finance/accounting/economics majors were also divergent and wait-and-see. The popularity of related major categories is stable but divergent. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Xinjiang is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from 2025 (24,000 liberal arts + 53,000 science ≈ 77,000), leading to intensified competition. In 2025, the first batch undergraduate score for liberal arts was 451, showing a fluctuating trend in recent years. Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces. The proportion of enrollment in Xinjiang is very small (approximately 0.9% in 2023), so regional preference has a limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift in rankings over the past three years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+12%), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Xinjiang, and the somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to continue intensifying based on the 2025 baseline of 866. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 958, with a range of 786–1130.
